privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated Webots base world created entirely in setup_task.sh. The explicitly required output path '/home/ga/Desktop/navigation_benchmark.wbt', WorldInfo title containing 'Navigation Benchmark', and the 'void' controller are all accurately described in the metadata and strictly enforced by export_result.sh and verifier.py regex checks.
